name: Car Detailing Simulator VR
short_description: In Car Detailing Simulator VR, you have the power to renew and restore cars to its former glory, catering to the demands of your discerning customers. Transform neglected vehicles into stunning and well-maintained machines that can be the envy of all.
detailed_description:
CAR DETAILING SIMULATOR VR

Experience a worry-free escape as the invigorating sound of high-pressure water washes away your troubles.
Car Detailing Simulator VR is a fun and relaxing game, which brings you the satisfaction of washing 10 classic and modern cars.

Key Features:


  • Three types of treatments (basic, internal, and external)
  • Each tool has some form of ammunition for its operation
  • Various degrees of dirtiness
  • A set of tools and accessories to work with
  • Modern garage equipped with a lift, rack, etc.
  • Take on new orders and earn money
  • Ten old-school classic and modern cars to work on

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Turkish
*languages with full audio support
